summary: Iteration 18 testing complete. All NEW features tested: Referral System (code generation, apply, stats, leaderboard), Advanced Portfolio Analytics (Sharpe ratio, Sortino ratio, max drawdown, volatility, correlation, diversification score), Enhanced KYC/AML Compliance (risk scoring, compliance reports, admin overview), Multi-language i18n (Spanish added - now 5 languages). 22/22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with all UI elements verified.

issues: WalletConnect 401 error on preloadListings - non-critical, external service
Risk metrics section and diversification section only show when user has trading/wallet data - this is expected behavior

critical_code_review_comments: Referral System fully working: code generation (8-char alphanumeric), apply code with validation, stats, leaderboard
Referral bonuses correctly configured: 0.001 NENO for referrer, 0.0005 NENO welcome bonus, 0.0005 NENO trade bonus
Cannot apply own referral code - correctly rejected with 400
Invalid referral code correctly rejected with 404
Advanced Analytics: Sharpe ratio, Sortino ratio, max drawdown, volatility (daily/annual), best/worst day, win/loss days
Correlation endpoint returns diversification score (0-100), HHI index, asset breakdown with weights
KYC Risk Score: 0-100 scale with factors (kyc_tier, velocity, alerts, account_age), risk_level (low/medium/high)
Compliance Report: Full user compliance data including KYC tier, risk score, volume (daily/weekly/monthly), limits, AML alerts
Admin Compliance Overview: KYC tier distribution, risk distribution, alert counts - correctly restricted to ADMIN role
i18n translations.js now has 5 languages: it, en, de, fr, es (Spanish added)
Settings page shows all 5 language options with proper selection UI
Dashboard has Referral card with BONUS badge linking to /referral
seed_data_creation: Admin referral code C4YJT8H3 created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 features all working: 1) Referral System at /referral with code generation, apply, stats, leaderboard. 2) Advanced Analytics at /api/analytics/advanced/portfolio-risk and /correlation with Sharpe, Sortino, max drawdown, volatility, diversification score. 3) Enhanced KYC at /api/kyc/risk-score, /compliance/report, /admin/compliance/overview. 4) i18n now has 5 languages (IT, EN, DE, FR, ES). 5) Dashboard has Referral card with BONUS badge. 6) Settings page shows all 5 language options.

referral_system.GET /api/referral/code: PASS - Returns/creates 8-char referral code with user_id, total_referrals, total_bonus_earned
referral_system.POST /api/referral/apply: PASS - Applies referral code, credits bonuses, validates own code rejection
referral_system.GET /api/referral/stats: PASS - Returns my_code, total_referrals, total_bonus_earned, referrals list, bonus amounts
referral_system.GET /api/referral/leaderboard: PASS - Returns top 20 referrers with username, total_referrals, total_bonus_earned
referral_system.validation: PASS - Own code rejected (400), invalid code rejected (404)

advanced_analytics.GET /api/analytics/advanced/portfolio-ri: PASS - Returns sharpe_ratio, sortino_ratio, max_drawdown, volatility, best/worst day, win/loss days
advanced_analytics.GET /api/analytics/advanced/correlation: PASS - Returns assets, breakdown, diversification_score (0-100), hhi_index, asset_count

enhanced_kyc.GET /api/kyc/risk-score: PASS - Returns score (0-100), risk_level (low/medium/high), factors, computed_at
enhanced_kyc.GET /api/kyc/compliance/report: PASS - Returns full compliance data: kyc_tier, risk_score, volume, limits, aml_alerts
enhanced_kyc.GET /api/kyc/admin/compliance/overview: PASS - Admin-only, returns kyc_tiers, risk_distribution, alerts
enhanced_kyc.access_control: PASS - Admin overview correctly returns 403 for regular users

i18n.translations.js: PASS - Contains 5 languages: it, en, de, fr, es
i18n.settings_page: PASS - Shows all 5 language options with proper UI

frontend_referral.Referral code display: PASS - Shows code (C4YJT8H3) with copy button
frontend_referral.Apply code input: PASS - Input field and Applica button present
frontend_referral.Stats cards: PASS - Referral Totali, NENO Guadagnati, Bonus Referrer, Bonus Trading
frontend_referral.Leaderboard: PASS - Classifica Top Referrer section present

frontend_portfolio.Summary cards: PASS - Valore Totale, PnL Realizzato, PnL Non Realizzato, Win Rate
frontend_portfolio.Export buttons: PASS - Trade, Portfolio, Margin export buttons present
frontend_portfolio.PnL chart: PASS - Curva PnL with period selector (7d, 30d, 90d, all)

frontend_settings.5 languages: PASS - IT, EN, DE, FR, ES all present with proper labels

frontend_dashboard.Referral card: PASS - Shows 'Referral' with BONUS badge and description 'Invita amici, guadagna NENO'
